# Atlas AI

Status: Draft public AI-readable summary for review
Last updated: 2026-06-08
Canonical domain: https://www.atlas-ai.no

Atlas AI is a Norway-first governed AI solution-layer company. Atlas AI helps businesses, students and private users apply AI through structured solution packages, work models, onboarding, Trust Center guidance and controlled delivery boundaries.

Primary public routes:

- Home: https://www.atlas-ai.no/
- Solutions: https://www.atlas-ai.no/solutions/
- Business AI Work Solutions: https://www.atlas-ai.no/solutions/business-ai/
- Student AI Study Solutions: https://www.atlas-ai.no/solutions/students/
- Consumer AI Productivity Solutions: https://www.atlas-ai.no/solutions/consumers/
- Managed Secure: https://www.atlas-ai.no/managed-secure/
- Pricing: https://www.atlas-ai.no/pricing/
- Trust Center: https://www.atlas-ai.no/trust/
- Onboarding: https://www.atlas-ai.no/onboarding/
- Contact: https://www.atlas-ai.no/contact/
- Legal: https://www.atlas-ai.no/legal/

Business/professional buyers are the primary commercial audience. Students and private consumers are secondary controlled lanes with explicit guardrails.

Atlas AI does not present itself as a proprietary foundation-model company, official vendor partner, custom-GPT storefront or vendor-branded product reseller. Provider names are explanatory platform lanes only.

Ordinary public forms are for low-risk qualification only. Confidential, restricted, regulated or customer-sensitive materials must not be submitted through public forms. Managed Secure and secure intake require separate qualification and validated secure-path controls.

AI outputs may be incomplete or inaccurate and require human review before reliance, publication, submission or operational use.
